---
name: Add a prompt
about: Submit a new prompt for the library (you can also use the Add a prompt form on the site).
title: "[Add prompt] "
labels: add-prompt
---

Submitted via GitHub issue. Paste the prompt JSON between the markers below — or just use the form at `/add-prompt.html` and it will populate this for you.

<!-- prompt-json-start -->
```json
{
  "title": "",
  "category": "",
  "use_case": "",
  "audience": "",
  "model": "",
  "inputs": "",
  "prompt": "",
  "example": "",
  "author": "",
  "sensitivity": "",
  "tags": []
}
```
<!-- prompt-json-end -->
